poster_title: One SPACE to Rule Them All: Jointly Mitigating Factuality and Faithfulness Hallucinations in LLMs
authors: Pengbo Wang, Chaozhuo Li, Chenxu Wang, Liwen Zheng, Litian Zhang, Xi Zhang
paper_info: 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025)

content: LLMs have unprecedented capabilities in NLP.
Factuality and faithfulness hallucinations hinder practical deployment.
Existing methods address these issues independently, leading to trade-offs.
Propose SPACE to enhance both factuality and faithfulness.
SPACE identifies and edits shared activation subspaces.
Factuality hallucinations: contradictions against verifiable facts.
Faithfulness hallucinations: deviations from user intent or internal inconsistencies.
Interventions for one type often exacerbate the other.
SPACE aims to mitigate both types of hallucinations.
Propose a unified framework for joint improvement.
SPACE edits shared activation subspaces to enhance factuality and faithfulness.
Formalizes the intersection of activation patterns through dual-task feature modeling.
Uses a hybrid probe strategy combining spectral clustering and attention head saliency scoring.
Experiments conducted on TruthfulQA for factuality and PDTB for faithfulness.
Comparative baselines: TruthX (factual accuracy) and CAD (faithfulness).
SPACE significantly reduces both types of hallucinations.
Mitigates the trade-off between factuality and faithfulness.
panels.figure_caption: Activation Distributions of Factual and Faithful Tasks.

content: Theoretical revelation of the trade-off between factuality and faithfulness.
SPACE identifies and edits critical subspace-contributing heads.
Experimental validation demonstrates superiority over SOTA baselines.
Proposed method offers a promising direction for LLM reliability.
SPACE effectively mitigates both factuality and faithfulness hallucinations.
Unified approach improves the reliability and trustworthiness of LLMs.
Future work: explore effectiveness across different LLM architectures and datasets.

Fig22.caption: Figure 3: Framework of the proposed SPACE model.
Fig22.description: 图中展示了提出的 SPACE 模型的框架。
